targets.query:
from(bucket: "network_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "host_availability" and r._field == "avg_rtt_ms")
  |> group(columns: ["name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "network_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "host_availability" and r._field == "packet_loss_pct")
  |> group(columns: ["name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "network_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "host_availability" and r._field == "alive")
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["name"])
